# MLCReductionType.max

**Case**

A reduction operation that applies to the maximum dimension.

## Declaration

```swift
case max
```

## Enumeration Cases

- **MLCReductionType.all**: A reduction operation that applies to all dimensions.
- **MLCReductionType.any**: A reduction operation that applies to any dimension.
- **MLCReductionType.argMax**: A reduction operation that applies to the maximum dimension you specify.
- **MLCReductionType.argMin**: A reduction operation that applies to the minimum dimension you specify.
- **MLCReductionType.mean**: A reduction operation that applies to the mean of the dimensions.
- **MLCReductionType.min**: A reduction operation that applies to the minimum dimension.
- **MLCReductionType.none**: A reduction operation that applies no reduction.
- **MLCReductionType.sum**: A reduction operation that applies to the sum of the dimensions.
- **MLCReductionType.l1Norm**: A reduction operation that applies a lasso regularization penalty.
- **debugDescription**: A textual description of the reduction operation you use for debugging.
